query: I cannot log into my account.
final_response: I'm sorry to hear you're having trouble logging in. You can usually reset your password by using the 'Forgot Password' link on our login page. If you continue to experience issues after trying that, please let us know and we'll assist you further. Please use the 'Forgot Password' option on the login page. If the issue persists, contact support to verify your identity and restore access.
